arts.ttl: No change to backing despite Rangers cup exit - Clement
arts.sum: Philippe Clement says he has had no indication he does not have the full backing of Rangers' board following their shock Scottish Cup defeat by Queen's Park.

arts.ttl: Clement insists 'nothing special' in board talks after Rangers' cup exit
arts.sum: Philippe Clement has revealed what was said to him after Rangers' shock Scottish Cup exit to Queen's Park as he demanded a reaction against Hearts on Sunday, live on Sky.

arts.ttl: Every word of Philippe Clement's bullish Rangers press conference from fan tirade address to spiky 'final act' exchange
arts.sum: The Belgian is feeling the heat in the wake of the Scottish Cup exit at the hands of Queen's Park but the club have stuck with the boss

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement reveals talks with Rangers CEO Patrick Stewart after Scottish Cup shocker
arts.sum: The Ibrox boss has spoken for the first time since that Scottish Cup exit to Queen's Park

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd debunks Rangers myth as he points out Philippe Clement fact that 'people forget'
arts.sum: The legendary Gers striker is fed-up with the current state of affairs in Govan

arts.sum: The Jambos haven't beaten the Ibrox side for five years - but they are on the back of an eight-game unbeaten run

arts.ttl: Patrick Stewart fits right in at Failure FC and Rangers fans tell him bigger question than Clement needs answered - Hotline
arts.sum: It's not just the Rangers manager in the firing line after the CEO's comments this week. Fraser Wilson takes your calls.
